steps.title: Match terms to context
steps.content:
The equation is
$$
12{,}600=3{,}000+240t
$$
The total price equals the down payment plus the amount paid over $t$ monthly payments.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: The expression $240t$ means $240$ dollars is paid each month for $t$ months. The number $t$ counts the payments, while $240$ gives the amount of one fixed monthly payment. The answer is B.
